label: plain_text
text:
Provide more opportunities to collect and organise data. Ask students
to guess what is the most popular colour, game, toy, school subject,
etc., amongst the students in their classroom and then collect the
data for it. It can be a fun activity in which they also learn about their
each way having its own advantages and limitations. For all these
tasks and the tasks under ‘Figure it Out', discuss the tasks with the
children and let them understand the tasks, and then let them plan
and present their research processes and conclusions in the class.
